dialogueLines.text: Hey Echo it's been a long time since the last time I saw you, thanks for coming by to chick in on Darry.  Everything is still very vivid in my head how that night went and I wish I could change it.  Do you have some time right now?

choices.text: Yeah I don't have much going on.
I'm in a rush but fine.

dialogueLines.text: Okay... I'll uhhh, make it quick then.

Darry and I were roommates and I had gotten a new TV for the house. The next day I woke up to the TV being broken on the floor and my car missing. I was so mad the whole day and I waited for him to return.

Darry arrived and we got into a bad argument..and I drove away. I was driving when I noticed a receipt for a TV earlier that day. I checked the trunk and I realized Darry got me a new TV. I returned to the house just to see it on fire, with firefighters spraying down the flames.  They took me away from the house and told me the news later…
I appreciate you listening, it means more than you think.  I wish I never left over somting so simple
Sorry for bothering you, I understand you don't want to hear nay of that.
I'm going to walk back home now, I lost my keys around here and can't find them.  If you want to help me find them they might be in one of those leaf piles over there.
